case.title: ARDEN FARMS CO. v. STATE DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE

opinion.h1: ARDEN FARMS CO. v. STATE DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE, 386 U.S. 350 (1967)
opinion.h4: 386 U.S. 350"> ARDEN FARMS CO. ET AL. v. STATE DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF OREGON. No. 1004. Decided March 20, 1967.
opinion.p: Robert Y. Thornton, Attorney General of Oregon, and Harold E. Burke and Don Parker, Assistant Attorneys General, for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
MR. JUSTICE DOUGLAS, MR. JUSTICE HARLAN and MR. JUSTICE WHITE are of the opinion that probable jurisdiction should be noted and the case set for oral argument.
